{"action":"present_ui","action_input":{"spec":{"elements":{"callout":{"children":[],"props":{"content":"BEAM's architecture is proven to achieve 99.9999999% uptime in mission-critical systems — that's less than 32 milliseconds of downtime per year!","title":"Nine Nines Reliability","type":"tip"},"type":"callout"},"f1":{"children":[],"props":{"description":"Handles millions of concurrent processes with minimal overhead.","title":"⚡ Lightweight Concurrency","variant":"shadow"},"type":"card"},"f2":{"children":[],"props":{"description":"\"Let it crash\" philosophy enables self-healing, resilient systems.","title":"🛡️ Fault Tolerance","variant":"shadow"},"type":"card"},"f3":{"children":[],"props":{"description":"Update running code without ever stopping the system.","title":"🔄 Hot Code Reloading","variant":"shadow"},"type":"card"},"f4":{"children":[],"props":{"description":"Built-in support for distributed apps across multiple nodes.","title":"🌐 Distributed Computing","variant":"shadow"},"type":"card"},"f5":{"children":[],"props":{"description":"Fair process scheduling prevents any single process from starving others.","title":"📅 Preemptive Scheduling","variant":"shadow"},"type":"card"},"features_grid":{"children":["f1","f2","f3","f4","f5"],"props":{"columns":3,"gap":3},"type":"grid"},"features_heading":{"children":[],"props":{"level":"h3","text":"Key Features"},"type":"heading"},"intro":{"children":[],"props":{"description":"BEAM is the virtual machine that executes code written in Erlang, Elixir, and other BEAM-based languages. Developed by Ericsson in the late 1980s, it was built for telecommunications systems requiring extreme fault tolerance and high availability. The name honors its key architects: Bogdan Normark and Björn Gustavsson.","title":"What is BEAM?","variant":"bordered"},"type":"card"},"root":{"children":["intro","sep1","features_heading","features_grid","sep2","usecases_heading","usecases_accordion","sep3","callout"],"props":{"direction":"vertical","gap":4},"type":"stack"},"sep1":{"children":[],"props":{},"type":"separator"},"sep2":{"children":[],"props":{},"type":"separator"},"sep3":{"children":[],"props":{},"type":"separator"},"usecases_accordion":{"children":[],"props":{"items":[{"content":"Real-time call processing and switching systems — BEAM's original domain at Ericsson.","title":"📞 Telecommunications"},{"content":"Powers platforms like WhatsApp and Discord, handling massive concurrency with ease.","title":"💬 Messaging Systems"},{"content":"Managing thousands of simultaneously connected devices reliably.","title":"🔌 IoT Applications"},{"content":"Low-latency trading systems and high-throughput transaction processing.","title":"💹 Financial Services"},{"content":"Robust backend systems with automatic failure recovery and zero-downtime deploys.","title":"🌍 Web Services"}]},"type":"accordion"},"usecases_heading":{"children":[],"props":{"level":"h3","text":"Use Cases"},"type":"heading"}},"root":"root"},"title":"BEAM — Bogdan/Björn Erlang Abstract Machine"}}
